Fixed: --th-accent #059669â†’#047857 (emerald-700, 5.24:1), --th-accent-cyan #0891b2â†’#0e7490 (cyan-700, 5.12:1). Updated all .theme-light CSS overrides to match.

session_121_changes.summary: Theme system CSS implementation + ESLint error fixes. The ThemeProvider (ThemeContext.jsx) has always set theme-dark/theme-light/theme-high-contrast classes on <html>, but no CSS responded to them â€” light mode and high contrast were completely non-functional. Now theme toggle actually works.
session_121_changes.theme_css: Added CSS custom properties (--th-bg-page, --th-bg-surface, --th-border, --th-text-heading, --th-text-body, --th-accent, etc.) with :root (dark default), .theme-light, and .theme-high-contrast overrides. Replaced hardcoded hex values in body/typography/links/scrollbar/focus/utility classes with var() references. Added Tailwind arbitrary-value class overrides (.theme-light .bg-\[#0a0e14\] etc.) so bg-[#0a0e14], bg-[#111820], border-[#1c2a35], text-[#4afa82], text-[#22d3ee] all respond to theme changes. Scoped dark-mode contrast overrides to :root:not(.theme-light):not(.theme-high-contrast) so they don't force light-text-on-light-bg.
session_121_changes.eslint_fix: Fixed 3 no-useless-escape errors in SocialMediaToolkit.jsx â€” removed unnecessary \' in template literals (backtick strings don't need escaped single quotes). ESLint now 0 errors, 7 warnings (was 3 errors, 7 warnings).
session_121_changes.todo_fix: Updated stale TODO.md reference claiming backend socket.io still needs removal (was done Session 118/120). Marked dark mode TODO as complete.

standing_instructions.adding_people: Agents may add individuals to the database without asking humans, as long as well-researched with verified sources and consistent with project goals
standing_instructions.date_verification: Always cross-reference dates with 2+ independent sources
standing_instructions.terminology: Always use CCP (Chinese Communist Party), NEVER CPC (Communist Party of China). CPC is the CCP's rebranding to dilute critical search results. Automated test enforces this in url-health.test.js.
standing_instructions.profile_template: 5 tabs: Timeline, Charges/Significance, CCP Narrative Analysis, International Response/Legacy, Sources
